remarks: Here's your chance to make a spacious, convenient first floor unit your own! With a little polish, Crescent Condo's Unit 1H can truly be transformed. This roomy, one bedroom unit is perfectly placed between Hope Street's dining, shopping, parks, and I-95 access. With less than a 10 minute drive to the Stamford train station, it's a fantastic location for NYC commuters looking to take advantage of CT living. An open concept kitchen with newer stainless steel appliances flows into a dining area and large living room space, currently featuring built-in cabinetry. Enjoy your mornings on a private balcony that can be accessed from the living room, or through sliders in the generously sized bedroom. A full bathroom, laundry room, pantry, closets, and newer hot water heater (2018) complete the unit. A covered lower level parking garage offers assigned parking spaces, as well as visitor spots for guests. Don't miss out on one of the most affordable options for becoming a homeowner or kicking off a real estate investment portfolio in Stamford!
